themes.label: Righteousness
themes.summary: This chapter presses into righteousness, justice, uprightness, or holy living before God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And the men of Beth-shemesh said, Who is able to stand before this holy LORD God? and to whom...". Cross references echo "Holy".
